security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: asset:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: asset:; connect-src 'self' ipc: asset: https://www.googleapis.com https://pagespeedonline.googleapis.com https://oauth2.googleapis.com https://analyticsdata.googleapis.com https://searchconsole.googleapis.com; frame-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'
